overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a samurai character riding a horse through a snowy mountain pass. The journey progresses from a narrow valley with a central boulder to an open snow-covered landscape under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy mountain pass with central rock formation

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through the narrow snowy valley toward a large boulder ahead

entered.detail: large dark rock formation blocking the center of the snowy path ahead
snow-covered mountain rising on the left side of the valley
snow-covered mountain slope on the right side of the valley
grey cloudy sky covering the mountain peaks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow snowy mountain pass with the camera following a samurai on horseback. A large boulder looms ahead in the center of the path, while snow-covered slopes rise on both sides under an overcast grey sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain passage with steep cliff wall

events.description: horse turns right to navigate around the large central boulder
passing the boulder and entering a section with close rock walls on the right

agents.ego_description: guiding the horse around the central boulder and along the right-side rock wall through the pass

entered.detail: dark rocky cliff face passing by closely on the right side
snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the end of the pass

segments.scene_description: The horse navigates around the central boulder, turning right to enter a narrower passage with a steep rock wall on the right. The central boulder falls behind as distant mountain peaks become visible ahead through the pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered mountain valley with distant peaks

events.description: emerging from the narrow rocky passage into the wide open valley

agents.ego_description: riding through the expansive snowy valley toward distant mountain peaks with a lone tree visible on the right

entered.detail: single evergreen tree standing on the right hillside
snow-covered mountain slope visible again in the distance

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens into a wide snowy valley as the horse leaves the narrow pass behind. Distant mountain ranges fill the horizon, and a lone pine tree stands on the right hillside while the character continues riding through the deep snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive mountain pass that gradually expands into a vast, open snowy valley. It begins by trailing a samurai on horseback through a narrow corridor of snow-covered slopes under an overcast grey sky, heading toward a large boulder blocking the center of the path. As the horse navigates around the boulder, the camera shifts right into a tighter passage pressed against a steep rock wall, leaving the boulder behind as distant peaks emerge in the distance. The scene then opens wide as the rider exits the narrow pass, transitioning into a sprawling valley where the horizon is filled with mountain ranges. Finally, the camera follows the character through deep snow past a lone pine tree standing on the right hillside.
